description: OHA: General operating rooms minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area per FGI 2022 as adopted by Oregon.
citation: OAR 333-535 / Oregon Health Authority Health Facility Licensing

description: OHA: Single-bed patient room minimum 120 sq ft clear; two-bed rooms minimum 100 sq ft per patient.
OHA: ICU cubicle minimum 150 sq ft; open-bay ICU minimum 120 sq ft per patient.
OHA: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 120 sq ft per treatment space.
OHA: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width.
OHA: Surgical suites 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered.
OHA: All hospital construction and major renovation requires Oregon Health Authority Health Facility Licensing plan review. Oregon does not have a CON law.
citation: ORS 441.025 / OHA Health Facility Licensing — No CON in Oregon

description: OHA: Oregon requires seismic evaluation and upgrade for all hospital buildings per Oregon Seismic Rehabilitation of Essential Public Buildings Program.
citation: ORS 455.447 / Oregon Essential Facilities Seismic Rehab
